state: PR-shaped OMP continuation automation added: fresh foreground no-session OMP iterations validate locally with live smoke, open one GitHub PR, wait for CODEOWNERS review/CI/merge, and only then continue; verify CI mirrors production hygiene with offline smoke for hosted runners, Windows-only Herdr pipe probes are gated so Linux all-target checks can enforce the workflow, and ledger CI handles force-pushed branch events whose previous tip is no longer fetchable.

state: Fixed PowerShell PR loop invocation after the first run failed on `Invoke-Checked omp --profile ... -p ...`: PowerShell bound `-p` as an ambiguous common-parameter prefix on the wrapper instead of passing it to OMP. The script now calls OMP through a dedicated native helper with explicit helper parameters, preserving the foreground PR loop contract.
evidence: Failed run left clean local branch omp/f13-20260714220248 before any OMP work; branch was deleted and work moved to omp/fix-ps-loop-invocation
PowerShell script parser accepts scripts/omp-pr-loop.ps1 after the dedicated native helper change
The OMP call no longer routes through Invoke-Checked's ValueFromRemainingArguments binder, so `-p` is passed to the native OMP process
next: Re-run scripts/omp-pr-loop.ps1 -AutoMerge after this fix merges; it should proceed past the OMP invocation and start F13 from the checkpoint capsule.

state: Pinned PR-loop OMP invocations to GitHub Copilot GPT-5.5 1M with high thinking across default, smol, slow, and plan model roles after a loop run selected Gemini and failed on Google quota. Both PowerShell and Bash loops now pass explicit --model/--smol/--slow/--plan/--models and --thinking flags, with user-overridable model/thinking parameters.
evidence: Failed run selected gemini-3.1-pro and hit Google API quota before any checkpoint work started; clean branch omp/f13-20260714221920 was deleted
omp --help in this environment lists --model, --smol, --slow, --plan, --models, and --thinking flags
omp models gpt-5.5 lists github-copilot/gpt-5.5-1m with high/xhigh thinking support
PowerShell loop uses dedicated native helper and passes --model github-copilot/gpt-5.5-1m --smol/--slow/--plan same model --models same model --thinking high
Bash loop mirrors the same forced model and thinking flags
next: After this fix merges, rerun scripts/omp-pr-loop.ps1 -AutoMerge; it should start F13 using GPT-5.5 1M high reasoning instead of Gemini.

state: Changed PR-loop profile handling so continuation runs inherit the current authenticated OMP profile by default. The synthetic `omp-pr-loop` profile is now opt-in via -Profile/--profile because it isolated credentials/config and caused GitHub Copilot auth failures even though --no-session already provides the required fresh-session isolation.
evidence: Failed run used synthetic profile omp-pr-loop and could not find GitHub Copilot credentials before checkpoint work started; clean branch omp/f13-20260715053226 was deleted
PowerShell loop default Profile is now empty and only appends --profile when a profile is explicitly provided
Bash loop default profile is now empty and only appends --profile when a profile is explicitly provided
Bash loop branch checkout was restored before the OMP invocation after restructuring the argument array
next: After this fix merges, rerun scripts/omp-pr-loop.ps1 -AutoMerge from the authenticated default OMP profile; it should start F13 with GPT-5.5 1M high reasoning and without synthetic-profile auth isolation.
